name: pyqueen
documentation:
# PyQueen

![](logo.jpg)

![github license](https://img.shields.io/github/license/ts7ming/pyqueen)
[![LICENSE](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-Anti%20996-blue.svg)](https://github.com/996icu/996.ICU/blob/master/LICENSE)
![Language](https://img.shields.io/badge/language-Python-brightgreen)
[![Documentation Status](https://readthedocs.org/projects/pyqueen/badge/?version=latest)](https://pyqueen.readthedocs.io/zh-cn/latest/?badge=latest)
![GitHub Repo stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/ts7ming/pyqueen)
![GitHub forks](https://img.shields.io/github/forks/ts7ming/pyqueen)
[![PyPI downloads](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/pyqueen.svg)](https://pypistats.org/packages/pyqueen)

PyQueen is a data development toolkit that can build ETL workflows

## Install

```bash
pip install pyqueen
```

## Doc

- [Document](https://pyqueen.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
- [中文文档](https://pyqueen.readthedocs.io/zh-cn/latest/)

## Overview
- pyqueen.DataSource
- pyqueen.Model
- pyqueen.Dingtalk
- pyqueen.Email
- pyqueen.Wechat
- pyqueen.Showdoc
- pyqueen.TimeKit
- pyqueen.Utils
- pyqueen.cmd
- pyqueen.Chart

methods.name: pyqueen.io.image.Image.df2image
documentation:
基于 pandas.DataFrame 生成png图片

```
param font_size

字体大小

param col_width

列宽: auto: 根据传入 df 自动设置 也可以传入列表指定每列宽度 由plt自动设置,

param df

pd.DataFrame对象

param file_path

目标图片路径, 如果为None则自动生成临时路径

return

```

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.set_db
documentation:
reset current database
\:param db_name: database name
\:return:

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.get_sql
documentation:
get data from sql query
\:param sql: sql text
\:return: pd.DataFrame

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.read_sql
documentation:
get data from sql query
\:param data: query on dataframe
\:param engine: use sqlite or duckdb
\:param sql: sql text
\:return: pd.DataFrame

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.exe_sql
documentation:
execute sql on server
\:param auto_commit:
\:param sql: str or list; if list execute every sql in list
\:return:

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.to_db
documentation:
write a pd.DataFrame to database
\:param df: df to write
\:param tb_name: table name
\:param how: append or replace
\:param fast_load: only support mysql and clickhouse. df to csv to database
\:param chunksize: chunksize
\:return:

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.get_v
documentation:
get value by key from kv database
\:param key: key
\:return: value

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.set_v
documentation:
set value for a key on kv database
\:param key: key
\:param value: value
\:return:

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.read_excel
documentation:
read an excel file to pd.DataFrame
\:param sheet_name: sheet_name
\:param file_path: file_path, if None use self.file_path
\:return: pd.DataFrame

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.to_excel
documentation:
write a pd.DataFrame to excel file
\:param sheet_list: \[[df1, sht_name1],[df2, sht_name2],...\]
\:param file_path: if None, use self.file_path
\:param fillna: string to fill NA value
\:param fmt: set excel cell format by column name
\:param font: font
\:param font_color: font color
\:param font_size: font color
\:param column_width: column_width
\:return:

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.download_dir
documentation:
download entire dir from ftp server
\:param local_dir: local dir
\:param remote_dir: remote dir
\:return:

methods.name: pyqueen.io.data_source.DataSource.read_page
documentation:
get source code of a page by url
\:param url: url
\:return: page

methods.name: pyqueen.service.pydingtalk.Dingtalk.__init__
documentation:
初始化
\:param key: 钉钉机器人key

methods.name: pyqueen.service.pydingtalk.Dingtalk.send
documentation:
文本类型
\:param content: 文本内容，最长不超过2048个字节，必须是utf8编码
\:param mentioned_list: userid的列表，提醒群中的指定成员(@某个成员)，@all表示提醒所有人，如果开发者获取不到userid，可以使用mentioned_mobile_list
\:param mentioned_mobile_list: 手机号列表，提醒手机号对应的群成员(@某个成员)，@all表示提醒所有人
\:return:

documentation:
图片类型
\:param base64: 图片内容的base64编码
\:param md5: 图片内容（base64编码前）的md5值
\:return:

classes.name: pyqueen.utility.time_kit.TimeKit

methods.name: pyqueen.utility.time_kit.TimeKit.__init__
documentation:
theday: int(8)
thetime: int(6)

methods.name: pyqueen.utility.time_kit.TimeKit.date2int
documentation: datetime对象转int

methods.name: pyqueen.utility.time_kit.TimeKit.time_delta
documentation:
时间加减
thetime: 基准时间
    int(6) 24小时制时间
    int(8) 8位数年月日
    int(14) 年月日时分秒
flag: 加减单位
    years,months,days,hours,minutes,seconds
value: 加减值
    thetime之前 value 写负值
    thetime之后 value 写正值
